# Cue Clock

Cue Clock is a minimal, distraction-free clock and countdown timer app designed specifically for broadcast professionals.

## Key Information
- **URL**: https://cueclock.app
- **App URL**: https://cue-clock-app.yanukadeneth.com
- **Repository**: https://github.com/yanukadeneth99/Cue-Clock
- **Developer**: Yanuka Deneth
- **License**: Open Source
- **Cost**: Completely Free (No Ads)

## Features
- **Dual Live Clocks**: side-by-side clocks configurable to 18 broadcast timezones.
- **Multiple Countdowns**: infinite timers tied to specific zones.
- **Deduction Offsets**: subtract pre-show buffer durations with single-tap logic.
- **On-Air Mode**: distraction-free, full-screen display for studio environments.
- **Persistent State**: settings saved locally across sessions.
- **Per-Timer Alerts**: visual and notification-based alerts.

## Tech Stack
- **Web App**: React, Tailwind CSS, GSAP.
- **Native App**: React Native (Expo).
- **Website**: Next.js, Tailwind CSS, GSAP.

## Mission
Built to provide a reliable, straightforward, and simple timing tool during live broadcast production.
